name: Ronen Faier
background: Mr. Faier has served as our Interim Chief Executive Officer since August 2024 and as our Chief Financial Officer since 2011. Prior to joining SolarEdge, he served as the Chief Financial Officer of m-systems and held various financial positions at SanDisk Corporation and Ernst & Young.

companies.name: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Interim Chief Executive Officer, Chief Financial Officer
